title: hieracium cottetii subsp. subhumile
intro: Hieracium cottetii subsp. subhumile is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as hawkweed, which is a type of flowering plant native to specific regions. The medicinal properties of Hieracium cottetii subsp. subhumile include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce swelling, soothe wounds, and alleviate digestive problems, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Hieracium cottetii subsp. subhumile can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used in alternative medicine, although proper dosage and caution should be exercised when using this plant for medicinal purposes.
